title: NEW Gemini Features Explained — How to Use Google’s Latest AI Upgrade
summary: YouTube tutorial demonstrating Gemini 3.5 Flash's capabilities across eight workflows including multimodal vision, native video analysis with inline Python, contract analysis with extended thinking, code generation from sketches, voice-to-task conversion, error fixing, OCR-based JSON extraction, and Workspace agentic automation. The creator claims the Flash tier now matches Pro tier performance at lower cost.
